name: process
description: Manage process — get background processes, get process details. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number limitation for the result returned

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Beginning point in the list to retrieve from.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description:
Sort the results in the ascending/descending order of record creation.
Default order is **descending** if `sort` is not passed
